entry.title: [ITENNIS] 2026 Wimbledon Recap and more… | Intuitive Tennis Live Q&A
entry.summary:
Subscribe to Intuitive Tennis Premium https://intuitivetennis.com
In today's live stream, I discuss the Sinner vs Zverev 2026 Wimbledon final and much more...
0:00 Is Novak Playing for Slam n25? 15:50 Making Sense of Serena’s Comeback 20:55 Can Berrettini be That Man Again? 22:19 What Are Your Thoughts on Maja Chwalinska Going into the Hard Court Season? 24:16 What Was the Highest Quality Match at 2026 Wimbledon? 25:56 Jumping Forehand 27:25 Do You Think Sinner Will Go for 9 Masters Titles in 2026 30:50 Novak is Tired of Hearing 25 33:09 Best Match of Wimbledon 2026 36:49 Djokovic Makes Semis of Slams with Ease While Rublev & De Minaur Never Have 37:38 Why Alcaraz Being the 3rd Seed is Bad? 46:00 Can You Talk About Shelton & Fritz? 49:09 Sinner in the Heat 51:05 Zverev Tactics vs Sinner 53:29 Musetti & Draper 53:49 Expectations for Eala 54:25 Can Medvedev Make a Deep Run? 57:22 Why is Sinner Nearly Unbreakable? 1:04:00 Shorter Players Doing Well 1:08:00 What Are Your Goals for the Channel Going Forward? 1:12:52 Can Iga Make a Comeback? 1:16:01 Can You Have a Plan for Not Holding the Mic? 1:17:57 Who Do You Think Should Have Won a Slam by Now Man or Woman? 1:20:01 Can Sinner Win ATP Finals without Losing a Set for the Third Year in a Row? 1:22:27 Do You Think Sinner Forehand Will be Better in Hard Court Swing? 1:27:49 What Do You Think of Martina’s Idea of Reducing Racquet Head Size 1:29:17 Muchova’s Grand Slam Chances 1:29:42 Will Sinner Winning 9 Masters in One Year Top the Big 3 Records? 1:32:25 Switching from Agassi Fan to Sampras Fan 1:33:32 What Will Happen to US Open Draw Now That Zverev is 2nd 1:34:07 I’m Scared 1:39:40 Peaking Early vs Peaking Late in Grand Slams 1:44:20 Will Alcaraz be Ready for US Open? 1:44:36 Who Was Your Favorite Player? 1:45:10 What’s Higher Level ITF or D1? 1:52:10 Djokovic & Zverev Level Comparison vs Sinner 1:53:44 Would You Choose Nadal or Djokovic Forehand? 1:54:06 Babolat Pure Drive Wimbledon Edition 1:54:39 Is the Pure Drive Still Your Main Racquet? 1:54:52 Who is the GOAT in Coaching? 1:55:56 Who is the ATP Player That Has a Game Comparable to Yours? 1:57:09 Are You a Tennis Coach? 1:57:45 Intuitive Tennis Premium 2:01:08 As a Nadal Fan Who Did You Root for When Federer Played Djokovic in Semis? 2:02:31 Is Davis Cup Dead Forever? 2:05:11 Will we See a Men’s US Grand Slam Champ? 2:07:15 What is the Next Match You Will be Uploading? 2:08:21 Can Sinner Break Djokovic Ranking Point Record? 2:08:37 Mboko Won’t Defend Canada WTA 1000 2:09:24 Is Rune Coming Back Soon? 2:10:12 Who Dissapointed You Most at Roland Garros & Wimbledon?
🎾 Order the Proton Ball Machine & Get FREE SHIPPING by Clicking this Link! https://www.hydrogensports.com/shipping-code?aff=10
🎾 Get 15% off on Diadem tennis racquets, strings, balls, grips, shoes, and more by clicking the link below and entering coupon code INTUITIVETENNIS15 (link and coupon code valid for any Diadem product) https://diademsports.com/?sca_ref=8126228.sCPPhpZ2JWmg
🎾 Get 20% off on Gamma tennis racquets, strings, balls, grips, hoppers, and more by clicking the link below and entering coupon code ARACIC20 (coupon code excludes Gamma stringing machines) https://www.gammasports.com/collections/tennis
🎾 Tennis Equipment Reviews: https://www.amazon.com/shop/intuitivetennis247
🎾 Get 10% OFF on Kirschbaum Strings & Grips (ENTER CODE INTUITIVETENNIS AT CHECKOUT) https://kirschbaumusa.com/INTUITIVETENNIS
🎾 Improve Your Swing Path with the Topspin Pro https://topspinpro.com/ref/IntuitiveTennis/
🎾 Get the Functional Tennis Saber https://www.functionaltennis.com/products/functional-tennis-saber?aff=47
🖱 SUBSCRIBE FOR MORE VIDEOS LIKE THIS 👉🏻 https://www.youtube.com/c/IntuitiveTennis?sub_confirmation=1
🤜🤛 Share this video: https://youtube.com/live/OvyLR8tSmCA
🎾 Second YouTube Channel 👉 https://www.youtube.com/c/IntuitiveTennis247 🎾 Premium Content 👉 https://www.intuitivetennis.com 🎾 Video Analysis 👉 http://bit.ly/2Kz8AEK
🎾 Instagram 👉 https://www.instagram.com/intuitivetennis 🎾 TikTok 👉 https://www.tiktok.com/@intuitivetennis 🎾 Facebook 👉 https://www.facebook.com/intuitivetennis #intuitivetennis #wimbledon #wimbledon2026
entry.content:
Subscribe to Intuitive Tennis Premium
https://intuitivetennis.com

In today's live stream, I discuss the Sinner vs Zverev 2026 Wimbledon final and much more...

0:00 Is Novak Playing for Slam n25?
15:50 Making Sense of Serena’s Comeback
20:55 Can Berrettini be That Man Again?
22:19 What Are Your Thoughts on Maja Chwalinska Going into the Hard Court Season?
24:16 What Was the Highest Quality Match at 2026 Wimbledon?
25:56 Jumping Forehand
27:25 Do You Think Sinner Will Go for 9 Masters Titles in 2026
30:50 Novak is Tired of Hearing 25
33:09 Best Match of Wimbledon 2026
36:49 Djokovic Makes Semis of Slams with Ease While Rublev & De Minaur Never Have
37:38 Why Alcaraz Being the 3rd Seed is Bad?
46:00 Can You Talk About Shelton & Fritz?
49:09 Sinner in the Heat
51:05 Zverev Tactics vs Sinner
53:29 Musetti & Draper
53:49 Expectations for Eala
54:25 Can Medvedev Make a Deep Run?
57:22 Why is Sinner Nearly Unbreakable?
1:04:00 Shorter Players Doing Well
1:08:00 What Are Your Goals for the Channel Going Forward?
1:12:52 Can Iga Make a Comeback?
1:16:01 Can You Have a Plan for Not Holding the Mic?
1:17:57 Who Do You Think Should Have Won a Slam by Now Man or Woman?
1:20:01 Can Sinner Win ATP Finals without Losing a Set for the Third Year in a Row?
1:22:27 Do You Think Sinner Forehand Will be Better in Hard Court Swing?
1:27:49 What Do You Think of Martina’s Idea of Reducing Racquet Head Size
1:29:17 Muchova’s Grand Slam Chances
1:29:42 Will Sinner Winning 9 Masters in One Year Top the Big 3 Records?
1:32:25 Switching from Agassi Fan to Sampras Fan
1:33:32 What Will Happen to US Open Draw Now That Zverev is 2nd
1:34:07 I’m Scared
1:39:40 Peaking Early vs Peaking Late in Grand Slams
1:44:20 Will Alcaraz be Ready for US Open?
1:44:36 Who Was Your Favorite Player?
1:45:10 What’s Higher Level ITF or D1?
1:52:10 Djokovic & Zverev Level Comparison vs Sinner
1:53:44 Would You Choose Nadal or Djokovic Forehand?
1:54:06 Babolat Pure Drive Wimbledon Edition
1:54:39 Is the Pure Drive Still Your Main Racquet?
1:54:52 Who is the GOAT in Coaching?
1:55:56 Who is the ATP Player That Has a Game Comparable to Yours?
1:57:09 Are You a Tennis Coach?
1:57:45 Intuitive Tennis Premium
2:01:08 As a Nadal Fan Who Did You Root for When Federer Played Djokovic in Semis?
2:02:31 Is Davis Cup Dead Forever?
2:05:11 Will we See a Men’s US Grand Slam Champ?
2:07:15 What is the Next Match You Will be Uploading?
2:08:21 Can Sinner Break Djokovic Ranking Point Record?
2:08:37 Mboko Won’t Defend Canada WTA 1000
2:09:24 Is Rune Coming Back Soon?
2:10:12 Who Dissapointed You Most at Roland Garros & Wimbledon?
